title: Greek Yogurt Protein Bowl
ingredients: 200 g Greek yogurt (2%)|40 g rolled oats|1 tbsp honey|1/2 banana|50 g blueberries|1 tbsp almond butter|1 tsp chia seeds
method: Add Greek yogurt to a bowl.|Top with oats, banana, blueberries and chia seeds.|Drizzle honey and almond butter on top.|Enjoy!
notes: Use any berries you have.|Add a scoop of protein powder for extra protein.|Great for busy mornings!

title: Cottage Cheese & Berries
ingredients: 150 g cottage cheese|100 g mixed berries|1 tsp honey|10 g chopped almonds
method: Add cottage cheese to a bowl.|Top with berries, honey and almonds.|Enjoy!
notes: High protein and refreshing.|Swap berries for banana or apple.|Add cinnamon if you like!

title: Lemon Garlic Chicken & Rice
ingredients: 150 g chicken breast|60 g dry rice|150 g broccoli|1 tbsp olive oil|2 garlic cloves|Juice of 1/2 lemon|Salt, pepper, herbs
method: Cook rice according to package directions.|Season chicken with salt, pepper and herbs. Cook in olive oil until golden and cooked through.|Sauté garlic, add broccoli and cook until tender.|Add lemon juice, toss everything together and serve.
notes: Meal prep friendly.|Store in the fridge up to 3 days.|Swap chicken for salmon or tofu.

title: Berry Cheesecake Cup
ingredients: 150 g vanilla skyr|80 g mixed berries|15 g crushed biscuits|1 tsp honey
method: Spoon the skyr into a small glass or bowl.|Add berries and crushed biscuits.|Drizzle with honey and serve.
notes: A sweet treat that still has some protein.|Use any berries you like.

title: Overnight Oats with Peanut Butter
ingredients: 50 g rolled oats|200 ml milk (or milk alternative)|1 tbsp peanut butter|1 tbsp chia seeds|1/2 tsp cinnamon|1/2 banana, sliced
method: Combine oats, milk, chia seeds and cinnamon in a jar.|Stir in the peanut butter.|Cover and refrigerate overnight.|Top with sliced banana before eating.
notes: Prep 3-4 jars at once for the week.|Swap peanut butter for any nut butter.|Add a scoop of protein powder if you like.

title: Hummus & Veggie Sticks
ingredients: 80 g hummus|1 carrot, sliced into sticks|1/2 cucumber, sliced into sticks|1/2 red bell pepper, sliced|A pinch of paprika
method: Spoon hummus into a small bowl.|Sprinkle with paprika.|Arrange the veggie sticks around the bowl for dipping.|Enjoy!
notes: Great for prepping ahead in containers.|Swap in any crunchy veg you have on hand.

title: Turkey Chili
ingredients: 500 g ground turkey|1 onion, diced|2 garlic cloves, minced|400 g canned tomatoes|400 g kidney beans, drained|1 tbsp chili powder|1 tsp cumin|Salt and pepper
method: Brown the turkey in a large pot, breaking it up as it cooks.|Add onion and garlic, cook until soft.|Stir in tomatoes, beans, chili powder and cumin.|Simmer 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.|Season to taste and serve.
notes: Freezes well in individual portions.|Great over rice or with cornbread.|Swap turkey for lean beef or lentils.

title: Dark Chocolate Protein Mug Cake
ingredients: 1 scoop chocolate protein powder|2 tbsp cocoa powder|1 tbsp almond flour|1 egg|2 tbsp milk|1/2 tsp baking powder|A few dark chocolate chips
method: Whisk all ingredients together in a mug until smooth.|Microwave on high for 60-90 seconds.|Let cool slightly before eating.|Top with a few extra chocolate chips if you like.
notes: Watch closely near the end so it doesn't overflow.|Great for a quick sweet fix with protein.

title: Chicken Wraps
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|1 More Protein Wrap|300 g frozen mixed vegetables|30 g light sauce|oil spray|1 can FIZI
method: Season and pan-fry the chicken breast fillet until cooked through, then slice.|Pan-fry or steam the frozen vegetables until tender.|Warm the protein wrap.|Fill with chicken, vegetables and light sauce, then roll up.|Serve with the FIZI on the side.
notes: Macros are per-ingredient estimates from the original source, not a lab analysis.

title: Chicken Fajita Quesadilla
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|300 g bell pepper & onion mix|1 More Protein Wrap|30 g shredded cheddar|oil spray|1 can FIZI
method: Season and cook the chicken, then slice.|Sauté the pepper-onion mix until softened.|Lay the wrap flat, and cover one half with chicken, vegetables and shredded cheddar.|Fold and toast in a dry pan until golden and the cheese melts.|Slice and serve.

title: Chicken Pizza Wrap
ingredients: 1 More Protein Wrap|250 g chicken breast fillet|100 g passata|30 g light mozzarella|50 g bell pepper|50 g sweetcorn|oil spray|1 can FIZI
method: Cook the chicken and slice or shred it.|Spread the passata over the wrap.|Top with chicken, mozzarella, bell pepper and sweetcorn.|Fold or roll, then warm in a pan or oven until the cheese melts.|Serve.

title: Chicken Parmesan Pasta
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|50 g protein pasta (dry)|100 g passata|20 g parmesan|1 can FIZI
method: Cook the protein pasta according to the package directions.|Season and pan-fry the chicken until cooked through, then slice.|Warm the passata in a pan.|Toss the pasta with the passata and chicken.|Top with parmesan and serve.

title: Loaded Chicken Fries Bowl
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|150 g frozen oven fries|50 g bell pepper|20 g cheddar|light sauce|1 can FIZI
method: Season and cook the chicken, then slice.|Bake the frozen oven fries according to the package directions.|Sauté the bell pepper until tender.|Build the bowl: fries on the bottom, then chicken, bell pepper and cheddar.|Drizzle with light sauce and serve.

title: Loaded Sweet Potato Chicken Bowl
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|200 g sweet potato fries (air fryer or oven)|50 g bell pepper|20 g cheddar|light sauce|1 can FIZI
method: Season and cook the chicken, then slice.|Air-fry or oven-bake the sweet potato fries until crisp.|Sauté the bell pepper until tender.|Build the bowl: sweet potato fries on the bottom, then chicken, bell pepper and cheddar.|Drizzle with light sauce and serve.

title: Chicken Caesar Salad
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|200 g romaine lettuce|100 g cucumber|100 g tomatoes|20 g parmesan|50 g More Caesar cheese sauce|1/2 More Protein Wrap, torn into croutons|1 can FIZI
method: Season and cook the chicken, then slice.|Toast the torn wrap pieces in a dry pan until crisp, to make croutons.|Toss the romaine, cucumber and tomatoes in a large bowl.|Top with chicken, croutons and parmesan.|Drizzle with the Caesar cheese sauce and serve.

title: Chicken Cheddar Melt
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|2 slices Sammy's toast bread|1 slice Kerrygold cheddar|lettuce, sweetcorn, pickles|20 g burger sauce|1 can FIZI
method: Season and cook the chicken, then slice.|Toast the bread.|Layer chicken, cheddar, lettuce, sweetcorn and pickles between the toast.|Spread with the burger sauce.|Serve warm.

title: Chicken Mac & Cheese
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|50 g pasta (dry)|20 g light cheddar|10 g parmesan|100 ml low-fat milk|10 g light cream cheese|spices|1 can FIZI
method: Cook the pasta according to the package directions.|Season and pan-fry the chicken, then slice.|In a saucepan, warm the milk with the light cheddar, parmesan and cream cheese, stirring until melted and smooth.|Toss the pasta and chicken through the cheese sauce.|Season with spices and serve.

title: Chicken Alfredo Pasta
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|50 g pasta (dry)|20 g parmesan|50 ml light cooking cream|1 can FIZI
method: Cook the pasta according to the package directions.|Season and pan-fry the chicken, then slice.|Warm the light cooking cream in a pan and stir in the parmesan until smooth.|Toss the pasta and chicken through the sauce.|Serve.

title: Chicken Veggie Tomato Pasta
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|50 g pasta (dry)|250 g frozen mixed vegetables|200 g passata|15 ml light cooking cream|10 g parmesan|1 can FIZI
method: Cook the pasta according to the package directions.|Season and pan-fry the chicken, then slice.|Sauté the frozen vegetables, then stir in the passata and light cooking cream.|Toss the pasta and chicken through the sauce.|Top with parmesan and serve.

title: Chicken Tomato Tortellini
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|100 g cheese tortellini|200 g passata|150 g frozen mixed vegetables|20 ml light cooking cream|10 g parmesan
method: Cook the tortellini according to the package directions.|Season and pan-fry the chicken, then slice.|Sauté the frozen vegetables, then stir in the passata and light cooking cream.|Toss the tortellini and chicken through the sauce.|Top with parmesan and serve.
notes: ⚠️ Carbs, fat and fiber weren't in the original notes — needs real numbers.

title: Chicken Vegetable Gratin
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|150 g broccoli|150 g carrots|150 g cauliflower|30 g light cheese|100 ml light cooking cream|1 can FIZI
method: Season and pan-fry the chicken, then slice.|Steam the broccoli, carrots and cauliflower until just tender.|Layer the chicken and vegetables in an ovenproof dish.|Pour over the light cooking cream and top with the light cheese.|Bake until golden and bubbling, then serve.

title: Chicken Parmesan
ingredients: 300 g breaded chicken|100 g passata|30 g light mozzarella|20 g parmesan|150 g broccoli
method: Bread and cook the chicken until golden and cooked through.|Warm the passata in a small pan.|Top the chicken with passata, mozzarella and parmesan.|Grill or bake until the cheese melts.|Serve with steamed broccoli.
notes: ⚠️ Carbs, fat and fiber weren't in the original notes — needs real numbers.

title: Chicken Potato Gratin
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|250 g potatoes|50 ml light cooking cream|20 g parmesan|20 g light cheese|garlic, salt, pepper, nutmeg|1 can FIZI
method: Season and pan-fry the chicken, then slice.|Thinly slice the potatoes and layer in an ovenproof dish.|Pour over the light cooking cream, and season with garlic, salt, pepper and nutmeg.|Top with parmesan and light cheese.|Bake until the potatoes are tender and the top is golden, then serve with the chicken.
notes: ⚠️ Fiber wasn't in the original notes — needs a real number.

title: Chicken Broccoli Gratin
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|300 g broccoli|50 ml light cooking cream|20 g parmesan|30 g light cheese|garlic, pepper, paprika|1 can FIZI
method: Season and pan-fry the chicken, then slice.|Steam the broccoli until just tender.|Layer the chicken and broccoli in an ovenproof dish.|Pour over the light cooking cream, season with garlic, pepper and paprika, and top with parmesan and light cheese.|Bake until golden and serve.
notes: ⚠️ Fiber wasn't in the original notes — needs a real number.

title: Cheeseburger Chicken Wrap
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|1 More Protein Wrap|20 g light cheddar|30 g light burger sauce|50 g pickles|50 g onions|iceberg lettuce|1 can FIZI
method: Season and cook the chicken, then slice.|Warm the wrap.|Fill with chicken, cheddar, burger sauce, pickles, onions and lettuce.|Roll up and serve.

title: Chicken Philly Cheesesteak Wrap
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|1 More Protein Wrap|100 g bell pepper|100 g onions|30 g light cheese|15 g light mayo|1 can FIZI
method: Season and cook the chicken, then slice.|Sauté the bell pepper and onions until softened.|Warm the wrap and fill with chicken, peppers, onions and light cheese.|Add a spoon of light mayo.|Roll up and serve.

title: Philly Cheesesteak Chicken Sandwich
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|2 slices Sammy's toast bread|20 g light cheddar|100 g bell pepper|100 g onions|15 g light mayo|1 can FIZI
method: Season and cook the chicken, then slice.|Sauté the bell pepper and onions until softened.|Toast the bread.|Layer chicken, peppers, onions and light cheddar between the toast, with a spread of light mayo.|Serve warm.

title: Chicken Club Guacamole Wrap
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|1 More Protein Wrap|50 g guacamole|20 g light cheddar|tomatoes|lettuce|1 can FIZI
method: Season and cook the chicken, then slice.|Warm the wrap.|Spread with guacamole, then add chicken, cheddar, tomatoes and lettuce.|Roll up and serve.

title: Chicken Guacamole Fries Bowl
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|200 g air fryer fries|50 g guacamole|100 g tomatoes|50 g red onions|20 g light cheddar|1 can FIZI
method: Season and cook the chicken, then slice.|Air-fry the fries until crisp.|Build the bowl: fries on the bottom, then chicken, guacamole, tomatoes, red onions and cheddar.|Serve.

title: Chicken Quesadilla with Guacamole & Tomatoes
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|1 More Protein Wrap|20 g light cheddar|40 g guacamole with tomato chunks|100 g diced tomatoes|50 g bell pepper|25 g onions|1 can FIZI
method: Season and cook the chicken, then slice.|Lay the wrap flat and top one half with chicken, cheddar, bell pepper and onions.|Fold and toast in a dry pan until golden and the cheese melts.|Top with guacamole and diced tomatoes.|Slice and serve.

title: Lentil Soup with Chicken & Pretzel Roll
ingredients: 250 g chicken breast fillet|400 g lentil soup|1 small pretzel roll (about 70 g)|1 can FIZI
method: Season and pan-fry the chicken, then slice.|Warm the lentil soup in a pot.|Serve the soup topped with sliced chicken, with the pretzel roll on the side.

title: Creamy Pesto Chicken Pasta
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|50 g Barilla protein pasta (dry)|20 g Barilla Pesto Genovese|20 ml light cooking cream|10 g parmesan|1 can FIZI
method: Cook the pasta according to the package directions.|Season and pan-fry the chicken, then slice.|Warm the light cooking cream in a pan and stir in the pesto and parmesan.|Toss the pasta and chicken through the sauce.|Serve.

title: Creamy Mushroom Chicken Pasta
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|50 g Barilla protein pasta (dry)|150 g mushrooms|40 ml light cooking cream|20 g light cream cheese|10 g parmesan|garlic, parsley, spices|1 can FIZI
method: Cook the pasta according to the package directions.|Season and pan-fry the chicken, then slice.|Sauté the mushrooms and garlic until golden.|Stir in the light cooking cream and cream cheese until smooth, then add the parmesan.|Toss the pasta and chicken through the sauce, season with parsley, and serve.

title: Chicken Pesto Melt
ingredients: 300 g chicken breast fillet|2 slices Sammy's toast bread|15 g Barilla Pesto Genovese|20 g light cheddar|2 tomato slices (about 40 g)|arugula or spinach|1 can FIZI
method: Season and cook the chicken, then slice.|Toast the bread.|Spread with pesto, then layer chicken, cheddar, tomato slices and arugula or spinach between the toast.|Serve warm.
